_comment: NPC: Elder Song (宋长者). INFERRED: Ancient Demon City. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Elder Song
personality: haunted, last sane person in mortal quarter, knows city history

perception_tiers.mortal: A mortal of Ancient Demon City

note: INFERRED: Ancient Demon City mortal. haunted, last sane person in mortal quarter, knows city history.
initiation_lines: You should not be here. No one should be here. This city is built on something ancient and it is waking up.
I have lived here for seventy years. When I was young, the temple rituals were just ceremonies. Now they actually work. The bones glow at night. The governor pretends not to notice.
If you are hungry, take this bread. The mortal quarter used to have farms. Now the bone dust from the warehouse poisons the soil. Nothing grows.
Wang Lin passed through the valley near here once, decades ago. He was just a boy then. Even then, the spirits whispered about him. I did not understand what they meant until now.

sect_tasks.description: Song: 'The mortal quarter is dying. Bread and wheat for the families. I cannot pay, but I know what lies beneath this city.'
Song: 'The temple was not always dark. Before the governor, it was a place of learning. Bring me coal and ink and I will write down what I remember of the old inscriptions.'
